title: cowork-harness cassette v3
description: Recorded control-protocol cassette produced by cowork-harness (https://github.com/yaniv-golan/cowork-harness). Contains a frozen scenario, recorded agent event stream, control-protocol responses, artifact manifest, and a staleness fingerprint. v3 adds `contentSig`. v4 persists `userVisibleRoots`. v5 (H9): `skillHash` excludes OS-junk (.DS_Store/Thumbs.db/desktop.ini) so an out-of-band OS metadata touch can't re-stale a cassette; `contentSig` stays junk-inclusive so `rehash` still migrates non-drifted cassettes.

scenario.description: Embedded scenario snapshot at record time.

events.description: Recorded agent event stream (newline-delimited JSON lines).

effectiveFidelity.description: The fidelity tier the live record resolved to.

artifacts.description: Snapshot of user-visible output files produced by the run.

fingerprint.description: Staleness tripwire over the skill/baseline inputs that determined the recording.

skillHash.description: Algorithm-specific hash of skill dir contents (staleness detection).

contentSig.description: v3+: Algorithm-independent SHA-256 over sorted relpath:content-sha256 pairs. Used by `rehash` to verify content is unchanged when the staleness algorithm changes.
